summary: Global Analytics Feature Testing Complete. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing: all 4 tabs render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Backend GET /api/analytics/global returns valid JSON with strategy_performance, forecast_quality (including KLGA data with MAE=4.3F), liquidity_insights, and timeseries sections. Frontend /global-analytics page renders all 4 tabs (Performance, Forecast Quality, Liquidity, Charts) with stat cards, station metrics table showing KLGA, and appropriate empty states. Global Analytics appears in sidebar navigation with Globe icon.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/analytics/global returns 200
Response has all required sections: strategy_performance, forecast_quality, liquidity_insights, timeseries
strategy_performance has aggregate fields: total_signals, total_executions, total_filled, realized_pnl, win_rate, total_trades
strategy_performance.by_strategy contains weather_trader, arb_scanner, crypto_sniper
weather_trader has expected fields: total_signals, total_executed, total_filled, avg_expected_edge_bps, rejection_reasons, total_scans, classified_markets
arb_scanner has expected fields: total_signals, total_executed, total_filled, active_executions
crypto_sniper has expected fields: total_signals, total_executed, total_filled, active_executions
forecast_quality has global metrics: global_mae_f, global_bias_f, total_forecasts, resolved_forecasts
forecast_quality has real data: 30 total forecasts, 1 resolved
forecast_quality.global_mae_f = 4.3F (from KLGA resolved data)
forecast_quality.error_distribution array exists with valid structure
forecast_quality.station_metrics contains KLGA
KLGA station has expected fields: station_id, sample_count, mean_abs_error_f, mean_bias_f
liquidity_insights has score fields: avg_traded_liquidity_score, markets_with_scores
liquidity_insights has rejection fields: weather_rejections, total_weather_rejections
timeseries has cumulative_pnl and signal_frequency arrays
timeseries arrays empty when no trades (expected)
Regression: GET /api/health returns 200
Regression: GET /api/status returns 200
Regression: GET /api/config returns 200
Regression: GET /api/analytics/summary returns 200
Regression: GET /api/analytics/strategies returns 200
Regression: GET /api/strategies/weather/health returns 200
Regression: GET /api/strategies/arb/health returns 200
Regression: GET /api/strategies/sniper/health returns 200
frontend_ui_tests: Global Analytics page loads with data-testid='global-analytics-page'
4 tabs present: Performance, Forecast Quality, Liquidity, Charts
Performance tab: stat cards visible (ga-total-signals, ga-total-executed, ga-total-filled, ga-realized-pnl, ga-win-rate, ga-total-trades)
Performance tab: strategy sections visible (weather_trader, arb_scanner, crypto_sniper)
Forecast Quality tab: stat cards visible (ga-global-mae=4.3F, ga-global-bias=-4.3F, ga-total-forecasts=30, ga-resolved=1)
Forecast Quality tab: error distribution histogram visible
Forecast Quality tab: station metrics table with KLGA data visible
Liquidity tab: stat cards visible (ga-avg-liq, ga-min-liq, ga-max-liq, ga-markets-scored)
Liquidity tab: rejection breakdown section visible
Charts tab: empty state message displayed (expected - no trades)
Global Analytics appears in sidebar navigation with Globe icon

critical_code_review_comments: GlobalAnalyticsService implementation is clean and well-structured with proper async handling for forecast quality data
Frontend GlobalAnalytics.jsx correctly uses data-testid attributes throughout for testing
All tabs render appropriate empty states when no data is available

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 4 tabs render correctly, all UI elements visible, navigation works)

test_credentials: None required - uses existing MongoDB forecast_accuracy data
seed_data_creation: None - uses existing 30 forecast records with 1 resolved for KLGA station
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Analytics feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/analytics/global at server.py line 1308 calls GlobalAnalyticsService.get_full_report(). Service at /app/backend/services/global_analytics_service.py aggregates data from WeatherTrader, ArbScanner, CryptoSniper, and ForecastAccuracyService. Frontend at /app/frontend/src/pages/GlobalAnalytics.jsx has 4 tabs with proper data-testid attributes. Route /global-analytics added to App.js. Nav item with Globe icon added to constants.js and rendered via Sidebar.jsx. Real forecast_accuracy data exists in MongoDB (30 forecasts, 1 resolved for KLGA with 4.3F error).

features_tested.strategy_performance_section: PASS - Contains by_strategy breakdown with all 3 strategies
features_tested.forecast_quality_section: PASS - Contains real KLGA data with MAE=4.3F, error_distribution, station_metrics
features_tested.liquidity_insights_section: PASS - Contains score fields and rejection breakdown
features_tested.timeseries_section: PASS - Contains empty arrays (expected - no trades)
features_tested.frontend_performance_tab: PASS - All stat cards and strategy sections render
features_tested.frontend_forecast_tab: PASS - Shows MAE, bias, histogram, and KLGA table
features_tested.frontend_liquidity_tab: PASS - Shows liquidity scores and rejection breakdown
features_tested.sidebar_navigation: PASS - Global Analytics with Globe icon, navigation works
